page_title: NERV-Produced Anti-G Special Decisive Weapon Shiryū Prototype Unit
text:
also known as is a weapon designed by NERV's Anti-Godzilla Division to counter the Kaiju in the GODZILLA vs EVANGELION collaboration series. It was designed in the real world by . https://www.polygon.com/2016/8/2/12363922/metal-gear-yoji-shinkawa-godzilla-evangelion 

Profile

Its purpose is to fight against "Godzilla", the monster which attacked and destroyed Japan's capital Tokyo countless times and is considered as “disaster" just as the "Angels" are. This is an "Anti-G Weapon" which NERV constructed 
with technical data feedback from the "Kiryū Series" developed by the Japan Self Defense Force in the past.

It has two modes: , when standing upright and , excellent mobility and a forward-leaning posture that specializes in tail blade attacks. https://ameblo.jp/sen-ti-nel-info/entry-12286284494.html 

Among its armaments are small blades on its spine and tail utilizing the same technology as the Progressive Knife, which can sever various 
objects at a molecular level using high vibration particles.

Also, it boasts a high close-combat capability with the "Anti Kaiju Battle Blades" attached to its arms.

Development

The early name when announced was .

A toy figure was developed by named https://ameblo.jp/sen-ti-nel-info/entry-12229201540.html . The figure is Approximately 180mm, made of ABS, ATBC-PVC, PA, POM plastics, the figure was modeled by T-REX and supervised by Yoji Shinkawa (Kojima Productions). The figure was released on 23 July 2017 for 20,000 yen (excluding tax). https://sen-ti-nel.co.jp/items/nerv-shiryu-shogoki/ 

A variant called {{nihongo|Shiryū Kai|}改}} https://sen-ti-nel.co.jp/items/nerv-shiryu-shogoki-kai/ has a dark coloring painted with gunmetal paint. https://ameblo.jp/sen-ti-nel-info/entry-12295752233.html 

In September 2024, it was announced that Shiryū will appear in the pachinko PACHINKO GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION: Second Impact G.
